action.reasoning: Observation: We are at iteration 25 with ~1.11 hours and 5 iterations remaining. The best official mIoU is 0.5132 from iteration 16. Iterations 20-24 were spent restoring a corrupted model.py; iteration 24 successfully loaded the checkpoint and passed a forward sanity check. The current predict.py implements a safe, proven multi-scale TTA pipeline (7 scales, max_size=3200, per-image accumulation, 4-GPU spawn) that produced the best score. Analysis: Training a new model is impossible in the remaining hour. The only way to secure or improve the score is to run the now-correct inference pipeline end-to-end. The code is already written and tested for model loading. Decision: Submit evaluation immediately using checkpoints/best.pt and predict.py without any further changes.
